hero.headline: Gear Rental Rates
hero.subhead: Straight pricing. No hidden fees. Just what you need to get on the iron path.

routeInfo.heading: Know the Route Before You Go
routeInfo.mapCaption: Ashley Gorge Via Ferrata — courtesy of Uintah County / AGVF

requirements.heading: Climber Requirements
items: Age: MUST BE 18 OR OLDER TO RENT, or 14-17 with an Adult
Prior climbing or via ferrata experience strongly recommended
Signed Ridgeline Rentals waiver + Uintah County waiver
Completed safety video (required before locker PIN is released)
requirements.note: We highly recommend completing waivers and the safety video ahead of time. It'll save you 15 minutes at the trailhead.

items.name: Full Kit
items.description: Everything you need for one climber — helmet, harness, and lanyard.

items.name: Via Ferrata Lanyard Only
items.description: For climbers who bring their own helmet and harness.

protection.heading: Optional Gear Protection
protection.body: Rentals include a refundable security deposit hold. If you'd rather skip the hold and climb worry-free, add our Gear Protection option at checkout. It covers accidental damage from falls and normal use of the course. Doesn't cover negligence or unreturned gear.
protection.finePrint: Without Gear Protection, a refundable hold is placed on your card at rental: $150 per kit or $60 per lanyard. Maximum hold per transaction is $250. Holds are released on the same day you return your gear. Multiple kits or lanyards? Gear Protection stacks — $16 for two kits, $10 for two lanyards, $15 for three lanyards, and so on.

documents.heading: Fine Print
documents.body: Every renter signs both our rental agreement + liability release and Uintah County's waiver before receiving a locker PIN. Review our documents ahead of time so you know what you're signing.

finalCta.heading: Ready to Climb Ashley Gorge?
finalCta.body: We open for the 2026 season. Leave us your email and we'll let you know the moment lockers go live at the trailhead.
